title: MEDNET - 211info
text: OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY MEDNET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription assistance to individuals once per calendar year up to $60. 937 Chetco Avenue Suite D Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Must be at or below federal poverty level and have no insurance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 469-3155 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 469-3155 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Copy of original prescription from doctor's office or emergency room must be presented at time of appointment LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY
